generation.generated_answer: A Map in JavaScript may appear to miss entries right after an insert returns the key due to case sensitivity. When using PostgreSQL UUIDs, pg canonicalizes them to lowercase on cast [1]. If you're inserting a non-canonical (uppercase) UUID and then immediately querying for it with a lowercase version, the Map will not find the entry because the keys do not match in case. To resolve this, ensure both the insert and query use the same casing for UUIDs.
